case_title: FRANCES (FRANCESCA) ARANETA VS. UNIVERSITY GAMES CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARANETA, FRANCES (FRANCESCA) AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY GAMES CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARANETA, FRANCES (FRANCESCA) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY GAMES CORPORATION $2,355.78 PRINCIPAL, $35.92 INTEREST, $115.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,507.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARANETA, FRANCES (FRANCESCA) AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY GAMES CORPORATION
REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS RECEIVED FROM STATE OF CA
